common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errorBoundary.title: The app hit a problem
errorBoundary.body: We saved the crash details for review. You can try again now.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: Live updates are paused and will resume when the connection returns.

landing.title: Your professional network, in your language.
landing.subtitle: Build your presence, connect with trusted peers, and discover opportunities that fit your path.

auth.loginSubtitle: Pick up your conversations and opportunities where you left off.
auth.registerSubtitle: Start with a clear, trusted account. We will help you complete your profile next.
auth.acceptTerms: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy
auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.secureHint: We use a secure session and never expose your email or password in the app.

errors.CONFLICT: An account with this email already exists.
errors.AUTH_EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
errors.PROFILE_HANDLE_TAKEN: This handle is taken. Choose another one.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check the fields and try again.
errors.NOT_FOUND: We could not find the requested data.
errors.OFFLINE: You need an internet connection to complete this step.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not reach Baydar. Check that the API is running and try again.
errors.INVALID_RESPONSE: Baydar returned data we could not read. Try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Try again later.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.terms: You must accept the terms to continue.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.subtitle: This helps others find you.
onboarding.offline: You're offline. You can review fields, but final saving needs a connection.
onboarding.headline: Headline
onboarding.headlineHint: Example: Digital product developer in Ramallah
onboarding.aboutHint: Optional. Write a line or two about your experience and professional interests.
onboarding.countryHint: Two letters such as PS or JO.

stepCopy.identity: Use your real name so your network stays clear and trusted.
stepCopy.profile: Add a handle and headline that help people understand your work quickly.
stepCopy.location: Location helps nearby opportunities and peers find you.
stepCopy.background: Add at least one work or education entry to start a serious professional profile.
stepCopy.photo: A photo is optional now, but it makes your presence clearer and more trusted.
stepCopy.network: Choose people you may know. We will send requests after saving your profile.

identity.confirm: I confirm this information professionally represents me.

photo.hint: Use a clear face photo. Maximum size is 2MB.
photo.permission: Photo access is needed to choose a profile photo.
photo.tooLarge: That photo is larger than 2MB. Choose a smaller one.

network.messageHint: Optional. Example: Glad to connect with you on Baydar.
network.empty: No suggestions right now. You can build your network from My network later.

validation.identity: Confirm your professional identity to continue.
validation.handle: Use 3-30 lowercase English letters, numbers, or dashes. Do not start or end with a dash.
validation.headlineMax: Headline must be 220 characters or fewer.
validation.year: Enter a valid year between 1950 and the current year.
validation.networkMessage: Message must be 300 characters or fewer.
validation.review: Review the required fields and try again.

errors.offline: You need an internet connection to save your profile.
errors.CONFLICT: This handle is taken. Choose another one.
errors.PROFILE_HANDLE_TAKEN: This handle is taken. Choose another one.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check the fields and try again.
errors.INTERNAL: An unexpected error occurred while saving your profile.
errors.generic: Could not complete setup right now. Please try again.

appGate.title: We need to verify your profile
appGate.loadingBody: One moment while we open the right Baydar space for you.
appGate.body: Could not verify your profile status right now. Try again.
appGate.offlineBody: We cannot verify your profile while you're offline. Try again once the connection returns.

errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests right now. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not reach Baydar. Check your connection and try again.
errors.INVALID_RESPONSE: Baydar returned data we could not read. Try again.
errors.AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.PROFILE_ONBOARDING_REQUIRED: Complete your professional profile before continuing.
errors.NOT_FOUND: We could not find the requested data.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check the fields and try again.

feed.title: Feed
feed.empty: Start by publishing your first post.
feed.error: Could not load the feed right now.
feed.jobsEntrySubtitle: Browse local roles and save the right opportunities before applying.

composer.title: What's on your mind?
composer.placeholder: Share an idea, a project, or a professional update…

search.title: Search
search.prompt: Try a name or handle to find people.

newGroup.title: New group
newGroup.subtitle: Start a group conversation with your connections.
newGroup.validation: Choose at least two members and enter a group name.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.applySubtitle: Share a short note with {{company}}. You can leave it blank and apply directly.
jobs.coverLetterPlaceholder: Tell them why you'd be a great fit…
jobs.emptyDesc: Try widening your search or clearing a filter.
jobs.notFound: This job is no longer available.
